summary: Renamed all sdd-* agent definitions to score-* and added SubagentStop hook infrastructure.
diff: Renamed .claude/agents/sdd-*.md to score-*.md (5 files). Renamed .claude/hooks/sdd-*.sh to score-*.sh (2 files, kept old files as delegates). Created .claude/hooks/score-next-step.sh SubagentStop hook. Added SubagentStop hook config to .claude/settings.json. Updated crates/sdd/src/workflow/mod.rs default_agent strings from sdd-* to score-*. Updated CLAUDE.md example JSON. Updated .score/tech_design/crates/sdd/logic/dispatch-model.md agent name references. Updated crates/sdd/tests/execution_modes_test.rs to reference score-* files.
